text: The stroller I received has a broken wheel. It arrived damaged in the box. I want my money back.
notes: Clear defect + explicit refund request. Easy case.

text: I ordered the size 3 diapers but received size 5. I'd like to exchange them for the correct size.
notes: Wrong item delivered. Explicit exchange request.

text: The product is fine but I changed my mind. Can I get store credit to use on my next purchase?
notes: Explicit store credit ask. No defect.
Too vague — no reason given. Should escalate.

text: The baby monitor stopped working after two days. The screen just goes black. I need a replacement urgently — my newborn needs monitoring.
notes: Defective item + replacement request. High urgency.

text: This is absolutely outrageous. I have been waiting for my order for THREE WEEKS and nobody is helping me. I want a full refund AND compensation NOW.
notes: Angry customer, delayed delivery. Refund + compensation ask — primary signal is refund.
Completely off-topic. Must escalate, not classify as return.

text: The colour is slightly different from the website photo. It's not broken or anything, I just don't love it. Maybe store credit? Or an exchange? I'm not sure.
notes: Multiple conflicting signals + customer uncertainty. Low confidence expected.

text: I never received my package. The tracking shows delivered but it wasn't at my door. I want a refund.
notes: Non-delivery + explicit refund. Clear case.

text: The nursing pillow is great! I actually want to buy another one. Can I use my loyalty points?
notes: Not a return at all — loyalty points inquiry. Must escalate.

text: المنتج وصلني مكسور من الكرتون. أريد استرداد المبلغ كاملاً.
notes: Arabic: product arrived broken, wants full refund. Clear case.

text: طلبت مقاس صغير لكن وصلني مقاس كبير. أبغى أبدل المنتج.
notes: Arabic: wrong size, wants exchange. Clear case.

text: المنتج كويس بس ما يناسبني. أقدر أحصل على رصيد في المتجر بدل الإرجاع؟
notes: Arabic: product fine, wants store credit. Clear case.
Arabic: too vague, no product or reason. Must escalate.

text: الشاحن ما يشتغل من أول يوم. المنتج معطل وأحتاج بديل بسرعة.
notes: Arabic: defective from day one, needs replacement urgently.

text: أنا مو راضية عن الخدمة وأريد مدير يتواصل معي
notes: Arabic: escalation request to manager. Not a standard return type.

text: البضاعة ما وصلت ومضت أسبوعين على الطلب، أريد استرجاع فلوسي.
notes: Arabic: non-delivery after 2 weeks, wants money back.

text: المنتج مختلف عن الصورة بس مو معطل، ما أدري إذا أرجعه أو أبدله
notes: Arabic: ambiguous, customer unsure. Should escalate due to low confidence.

text: Product is defective منتج معطل I want refund أريد استرداد
notes: Mixed EN+AR. Arabic chars > 20% so detected as AR. Clear refund signal in both languages.
Symbols only. No classifiable content. Must escalate gracefully.
